info.title: Slack-like Chat API Documentation
info.description: This is a complete RESTful API that supports real-time messaging, channel management, user authentication, and more.
info.authentication: This API uses JWT Token for authentication. After successful login, the system sets auth_token in the Cookie.

restApis.description: User login endpoint, supporting both password and verification code login methods.
restApis.requestExample:
# Password login
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password123"
  }'

# Verification code login
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "code": "123456"
  }'

restApis.description: User registration endpoint.
restApis.requestExample:
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/register \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password123",
    "displayName": "John Doe",
    "realName": "John Doe"
  }'

restApis.description: Get detailed information of the currently logged in user.
User logout.
Send verification code to user email.
Get detailed profile of the current user.
restApis.requestExample:
curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/api/auth/profile \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Cookie: auth_token=your_token_here" \
  -d '{
    "displayName": "New Name",
    "bio": "Updated bio"
  }'

restApis.description: Update current user's profile information.
restApis.requestExample:
curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/api/auth/profile \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Cookie: auth_token=your_token_here" \
  -d '{
    "displayName": "New Name",
    "bio": "Updated bio"
  }'

restApis.description: Send a new message to a channel or direct message.
restApis.requestExample:
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/messages \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Cookie: auth_token=your_token_here" \
  -d '{
    "content": "Hello everyone!",
    "channelId": "channel123"
  }'

restApis.description: Get a list of messages from a channel or direct message.
Search for messages containing keywords.
Get context messages (10 before and after) for a specified message.
Mark messages as read.
Clear all messages from a channel or direct message (admin permission required).
Get a specific message by ID.
Update message content (only the author can edit).
restApis.requestExample:
curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3000/api/messages/msg123 \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Cookie: auth_token=your_token_here" \
  -d '{"content": "Updated message content"}'

restApis.description: Delete a message (only the author can delete).
Reply to a message, creating a thread.
restApis.requestExample:
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/messages/msg123/reply \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Cookie: auth_token=your_token_here" \
  -d '{"content": "This is a reply"}'

restApis.description: Get all thread replies for a message.
Add a reaction to a message.
Remove a reaction from a message.
Get a list of all channels visible to the current user.
restApis.requestExample:
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/channels \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Cookie: auth_token=your_token_here" \
  -d '{
    "name": "project-alpha",
    "description": "Alpha project discussion channel",
    "isPrivate": false
  }'

restApis.description: Create a new channel.
restApis.requestExample:
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/channels \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Cookie: auth_token=your_token_here" \
  -d '{
    "name": "project-alpha",
    "description": "Alpha project discussion channel",
    "isPrivate": false
  }'

restApis.description: User joins a specified channel.
User leaves a specified channel.
Get a list of members in a specified channel.
Admin batch invites users to join a channel.
Get detailed information about a specific channel.
Update channel information.
Delete a channel.
Invite a user to join a channel.
Remove a member from a channel.
Get notification preferences for a channel.
Update notification preferences for a channel.
restApis.requestExample:
curl -X PUT http://localhost:3000/api/channels/channel123/notification-preferences \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Cookie: auth_token=your_token_here" \
  -d '{"notifyOnNewMessage": true, "notifyOnMention": true, "notifyOnThread": false}'

restApis.description: Search for users.
Get user list (admin permission required).
Get unread message counts for all channels and direct messages of the current user.
Get user's starred messages/channels list.
Add a star.
Remove a star.
Get system health status.
Upload files to the server.
Get detailed system information and user statistics.
© 2026 Slack-like Chat API. All rights reserved.

mcpTools.name: health_check
mcpTools.description: Check the health status of the MCP server, database, and WebSocket connections.

mcpTools.name: register
mcpTools.description: Create a new user account.

mcpTools.name: login
mcpTools.description: Authenticate user and obtain access token.

mcpTools.name: send_verification
mcpTools.description: Send a verification code to user email for email verification login.

mcpTools.name: logout
mcpTools.description: Logout user and invalidate the current token.

mcpTools.name: get_me
mcpTools.description: Get the current authenticated user's information.

mcpTools.name: get_profile
mcpTools.description: Get user profile information.

mcpTools.name: update_profile
mcpTools.description: Update user profile information.
mcpTools.inputSchema:
{
  "displayName": string,  // New display name
  "realName": string,     // New real name
  "avatarUrl": string,    // New avatar URL
  "timezone": string,     // New timezone
  "userToken": string   // Current user authentication token
}

mcpTools.name: list_channels
mcpTools.description: Get a list of all channels visible to the current user.

mcpTools.name: create_channel
mcpTools.description: Create a new channel.

mcpTools.name: get_channel
mcpTools.description: Get detailed information about a specific channel.

mcpTools.name: update_channel
mcpTools.description: Update channel information.

mcpTools.name: delete_channel
mcpTools.description: Delete a channel.

mcpTools.name: join_channel
mcpTools.description: User joins a specified channel.

mcpTools.name: leave_channel
mcpTools.description: User leaves a specified channel.

mcpTools.name: list_channel_members
mcpTools.description: Get a list of members in a specified channel.

mcpTools.name: invite_channel_member
mcpTools.description: Invite a user to join a channel.

mcpTools.name: join_all_channel_members
mcpTools.description: Add all users to a specified channel.

mcpTools.name: get_channel_permissions
mcpTools.description: Get the current user's role and permissions in a channel.

mcpTools.name: list_messages
mcpTools.description: Get messages from a channel or direct message.
mcpTools.inputSchema:
{
  "channelId": string,        // Channel ID (required if dmConversationId not provided)
  "dmConversationId": string, // DM conversation ID (required if channelId not provided)
  "limit": number,           // Number of results (default: 50, max: 100)
  "offset": number,           // Offset for pagination (default: 0)
  "userToken": string        // Current user authentication token
}

mcpTools.name: send_message
mcpTools.description: Send a new message to a channel or direct message.
mcpTools.inputSchema:
{
  "content": string,          // Message content (required if attachments not provided)
  "channelId": string,        // Channel ID (required if dmConversationId not provided)
  "dmConversationId": string, // DM conversation ID (required if channelId not provided)
  "attachments": array,       // Array of attachments
  "userToken": string        // Current user authentication token
}

mcpTools.name: get_message
mcpTools.description: Get a specific message by ID.

mcpTools.name: update_message
mcpTools.description: Update message content (only the author can edit).

mcpTools.name: delete_message
mcpTools.description: Delete a message (only the author can delete).

mcpTools.name: reply_to_message
mcpTools.description: Reply to a message, creating a thread.

mcpTools.name: get_thread_replies
mcpTools.description: Get all thread replies for a message.

mcpTools.name: add_reaction
mcpTools.description: Add a reaction to a message.

mcpTools.name: remove_reaction
mcpTools.description: Remove a reaction from a message.

mcpTools.name: search_messages
mcpTools.description: Search for messages containing keywords.

mcpTools.name: get_reactions
mcpTools.description: Get all reactions on a specific message.

mcpTools.name: context_search_messages
mcpTools.description: Search for messages with context around each result.

mcpTools.name: mark_messages_read
mcpTools.description: Mark messages in a channel or DM as read.

mcpTools.name: mark_all_messages_read
mcpTools.description: Mark all messages in all channels as read.

mcpTools.name: clear_messages
mcpTools.description: Clear all messages in a channel or DM.

mcpTools.name: list_users
mcpTools.description: Get a list of all users.

mcpTools.name: search_users
mcpTools.description: Search for users by name or email.

mcpTools.name: get_user
mcpTools.description: Get detailed information about a specific user.

mcpTools.name: get_unread_counts
mcpTools.description: Get the count of unread messages across all channels and DMs.

mcpTools.name: get_starred_users
mcpTools.description: Get a list of users starred by the current user.

mcpTools.name: toggle_starred_user
mcpTools.description: Star or unstar a user.

mcpTools.name: create_dm
mcpTools.description: Create a new direct message conversation.

mcpTools.name: get_dm
mcpTools.description: Get direct message conversation with a specified user.

mcpTools.name: get_read_position
mcpTools.description: Get the read position (last read message) in a channel or DM.

mcpTools.name: get_channel_notification_prefs
mcpTools.description: Get notification preferences for a channel.

mcpTools.name: update_channel_notification_prefs
mcpTools.description: Update notification preferences for a channel.

mcpTools.name: get_dm_notification_prefs
mcpTools.description: Get notification preferences for a DM conversation.

mcpTools.name: update_dm_notification_prefs
mcpTools.description: Update notification preferences for a DM conversation.

mcpTools.name: get_attachments
mcpTools.description: Get all attachments in a conversation.

mcpTools.name: delete_attachment
mcpTools.description: Delete an attachment.

mcpTools.name: create_attachment_upload_url
mcpTools.description: Get a pre-signed URL for uploading an attachment.

mcpTools.name: get_thread_count
mcpTools.description: Get the count of unread threads and total unread replies.

mcpTools.name: get_unread_threads
mcpTools.description: Get list of unread threads.

mcpTools.name: mark_thread_read
mcpTools.description: Mark a thread as read.
